title: Boyfriend
why_this_song: Boyfriend by Justin Bieber (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'd like to be everything you want
Hey girl, let me talk to you
If I was your boyfriend, never let you go
Keep you on my arm girl, you'd never be alone
Tell me what you like yeah tell me what you don't
I could be your Buzz Lightyear fly across the globe
I don't never wanna fight yeah, you already know

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "boyfriend" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "boyfriend" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Chillin by the fire while we eatin' fondue
Hey girl, let me talk to you

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Boyfriend" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Boyfriend"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Boyfriend", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Boyfriend", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Boyfriend" was released in 2012. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Boyfriend" foi lançada em 2012. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Justin Bieber one question about "Boyfriend", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Justin Bieber sobre "Boyfriend", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Boyfriend" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Boyfriend" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
